studies.title: Evaluation study of digital tinnitus counseling Meine Tinnitus App

_verification.reason: The study title explicitly mentions 'Meine Tinnitus App,' which matches the product name. While the abstract and intervention details are not available, the title strongly indicates the study is about the specific DTx product.

_classification.reason: The study title suggests an evaluation of a digital counseling app, which is likely observational and focused on real-world usage rather than a controlled interventional design. However, due to lack of detailed information, confidence is moderate.
